{{ define "main" }}

BLIP

Instant VMs on Kubernetes.

GET STARTED

INSTANT ACCESS

SSH into fresh virtual machines in milliseconds.

EPHEMERAL BY DEFAULT

VMs are rebuilt when you disconnect.

ZERO TRUST AUTH

SSH certificate authentication or GitHub Actions auth.

HOW IT WORKS

01

CONNECT

SSH to the gateway with your signed certificate. The gateway authenticates you via the cluster CA.

02

ALLOCATE

A VM is claimed from the pool and booted. The gateway proxies your connection through.

03

WORK

You have a full Linux environment. Run builds, tests, deployments — whatever you need.

04

VANISH

Disconnect and the VM is destroyed. Or retain it for up to 12 hours if you need to come back.

{{ end }}
